'''Ayjae''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian Twi'lek]] treasure hunter who was mauled by [[Tuk'ata/Legends|Tuk'ata]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].
